news.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
news.summary: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

news.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
news.summary: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

news.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
news.summary: Digg returns (again) as another place to read AI news.

news.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
news.summary: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

news.title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
news.summary: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainable digital subscription business as print revenue continues to decline.

news.title: Apple brings encrypted RCS chats to iPhone
news.summary: Apple now lets you have encrypted RCS conversations with Android users through the Messages app on iOS. news.title: Texas sues Netflix for advertising ‘bait and switch’ and spying
news.summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against Netflix, accusing the company of turning its back on its promise to remain ad-free and safe for kids. news.summary: For the first time, Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI. news.title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
news.summary: A US passenger tested "mildly positive," but WHO is calling it "inconclusive" for now.

news.title: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
news.summary: Shutdown of Starlink location feature won’t dampen interest in GPS alternatives.

news.summary: Probably the last big updates we'll see before the next versions appear at WWDC.

news.summary: Lipa says her picture contributed to Samsung's "enormous revenue."

news.title: Pirates are already playing Forza Horizon 6 days before its launch
news.summary: Crackers take advantage of unencrypted files that briefly appeared on Steam.

news.title: Testing for ‘Bad Cholesterol’ Doesn’t Tell the Whole Story
news.summary: There’s a more accurate way of measuring who’s at risk for cholesterol-related health issues. So why don’t more doctors use it?

news.title: The FCC Received Hundreds of Complaints About Bad Bunny’s ‘Vulgar’ Super Bowl Performance
news.summary: The complaints, obtained by WIRED, described Bad Bunny’s performance as being overly sexual and protested that the show was in Spanish.

news.title: There’s an Unhinged New Video Game About Trump and the Iran War
news.summary: The game, developed by the group of anonymous artists known as Secret Handshake, is available online and in person in Washington, DC.

news.title: A New Hantavirus Vaccine Is in the Works
news.summary: Since 2023, Moderna and Korea University have been developing a new mRNA vaccine for hantavirus. The work has been promising so far, but a finished product isn't likely coming any time soon.

news.title: Update Your iPhone Now for Better Encrypted Messaging With Android
news.summary: As part of the iOS 26.5 update, Apple’s Messages app can now encrypt texts between some iPhone and Android smartphones.
